parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ structuredQuery: { from: [{ collectionId: 'products' }], where: { compositeFilter: { op: 'AND', filters: [ { fieldFilter: { field: { fieldPath: 'is_active' }, op: 'EQUAL', value: { booleanValue: true } } }, { fieldFilter: { field: { fieldPath: 'search_tokens' }, op: 'ARRAY_CONTAINS_ANY', value: { arrayValue: { values: $('Preparar Busca').first().json.candidate_tokens.map((token) => ({ stringValue: token })) } } } } ] } }, limit: 60 } }) }}
